title: Senior Software Engineer - Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates!
